title: Booking Holdings: Why The Stock Is Undervalued
text: Booking Holdings (BKNG) stock has been lagging the performance of the S&P500 over the past years while headwinds from the Covid-19 pandemic have further amplified that underperformance. Booking's recent financial results demonstrated a meaningful recovery with strong top- and bottom-line growth indicating that Booking is well on track to a full recovery beyond pre-pandemic levels.

title: Booking Holdings Should Offer Substantial Inflation Protection
text: One of the best strategies to fend off inflation is to invest in wonderful companies even at fair, rather than cheap, prices. We believe Booking is still somewhat undervalued as a result of the impact the Covid crisis had on the company, investors might not be comfortable getting back into the shares.

title: Why Booking Holdings (BKNG) Could Beat Earnings Estimates Again

title: This Company Is Likely To Offer Better Returns Over CSX Stock
text: Despite its comparatively higher valuation, we think Booking Holdings stock (NASDAQ: BKNG) is currently a better pick than CSX stock (NASDAQ: CSX). BKNG stock is trading at 8.6x trailing revenues compared to 6.2x for CSX stock.

title: Booking Holdings to Webcast First Quarter 2022 Financial Results on May 4
text: NORWALK, Conn., April 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Booking Holdings (NASDAQ: BKNG) announced today that it intends to hold a conference call to discuss its first quarter 2022 financial results on Wednesday, May 4 at 4:30 p.m.
